title: When Your Overnight AI Coding Run Fails: A Troubleshooting Guide
description: Addresses conversion bottleneck: first-run failures cause evaluator dropout. Covers 5 predictable failure modes (vague spec, oversized task, model mismatch, rate limits, missing deps) with concrete fixes.

secondary_repair.description: 5 docs vs-pages now noindex, nofollow via build-time meta tag injection. Sphinx rebuild + deploy verified live.
